title: Bitter Juicy Slovakian Bamboo Shoot Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew that showcases fresh bamboo shoots with a subtle bitterness and juicy texture, inspired by Slovakian cuisine.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a ttukbaegi earthenware pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add diced onion and minced garlic, sauté until the onion becomes translucent.
Stir in sliced beef, cooking until the meat changes color.
Pour in soy sauce and rice wine vinegar, stirring to coat all ingredients evenly.
Add the bamboo shoots and pour in vegetable broth, bringing the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Sprinkle in the sugar and black pepper, then cover the pot and let it cook on low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Uncover, reduce the stew slightly for 5 minutes to concentrate the flavors, and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped spring onions, and enjoy the bitter yet juicy Slovakian bamboo shoot stew.
